About
Reports and templates

Dream journal templates and personal report formats.

This page keeps the paid-content path separate from the free symbol search. It can later connect to a checkout page without changing the public URL.

Template

Dream Journal Template

A printable worksheet for scene, symbol, mood, setting, and follow-up notes.

Report

Personal Dream Symbol Report

A structured report format for recurring symbols, emotional patterns, and reading boundaries.

Product

Symbol Study Cards

A small digital product direction for common dreams such as water, teeth, houses, and animals.

Ask about report options

Dream Meaning Guide

Dream symbols, interpretation tools, and reflective journal guidance.
